title: LifeSmart Nature Switch (Heavy Duty) LS220-GRH
description:
Work with Smart Station,Nature Switch(Heavy Duty) is a smart switch designed to control high power machine or device. It uses the high-power latching relay that can withstand high current and control the live and neutral loop connect or disconnect at the same time.
Adapter: AC 100-240V~ 20A | Packaging: English | Package size: 86*86*37.5 | Weight: 0.135 kg
